Why a room beats one voice

Ask one AI a question and you get one confident answer with one frame you cannot see. Confab puts a room of advisors with different points of view in front of you: you ask once, in plain words, and the room brings the angles, talks it through, and catches the blind spot a single answer hides.

Home Why a room License

Why one answer is risky

  • A single model, asked plainly, gives the safe, middle-of-the-road reply that agrees with the shape of your question.
  • Getting genuinely useful answers takes a point of view: what matters, what to rule out, which angle to think it through. Almost no one is taught that steering.
  • In Confab the point of view is already in the room. Each advisor carries one, so you ask once and the room brings the angles for you.
  • Because the advisors talk to each other, the disagreement happens out loud and the mistake gets caught in the room, not after you have acted on it.

Get Confab
